Install TensorFlow Models Garden release version 2.4.1 and TensorFlow 2.4.1 using pip or conda
Clone the TensorFlow Models repository from https://github.com/tensorflow/models.git at commit hash abcdefg (assuming this is the latest commit where the bug was reported)
Navigate to the directory research/delf/delf/python/training/model/ and create a new Python file named delf_model_test.py
Copy and paste the code from the provided Code Context into delf_model_test.py
Ensure that the required dependencies are installed by running !pip install absl-py tensorflow-text==2.4.1 delf-python
Set up a virtual environment with Python 3.8 and activate it
Navigate to the directory research/delf/delf/python/training/model/ in your terminal or command prompt
Run the delf_model_test.py file using the command python -m unittest discover .

Verify that the test_build_model method fails with an ImportError, specifically: /usr/local/lib/python3.10/dist-packages/tensorflow_text/core/pybinds/tflite_registrar.so: undefined symbol: _ZN4absl12lts_2022062320raw_logging_internal21internal_log_functionB5cxx11E
Check the output logs for any additional error messages or stack traces related to the missing symbol
